LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS SEAN NICHOLSON AND LESLIE NICHOLSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - THE COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT'S DILATORY DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF HAS STANDING TO MAINTAIN THIS ACTION AS AN ASSIGNEE. PLAINTIFF NEED NOT PLEAD DETAILS OR EVIDENTIARY FACTS REGARDING THE ASSIGNMENT TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. THE EXISTENCE OF THE LEGAL MALPRACTICE ACTION DOES NOT DEFEAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. THE COURT SUGGESTS THAT THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO AN ORDER CONSOLIDATING THE TWO CASES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS SEAN NICHOLSON and LESLIE NICHOLSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The court overrules defendant's dilatory demurrer. Plaintiff has standing to maintain this action as an assignee. Plaintiff need not plead details or evidentiary facts regarding the assignment to state a cause of action. The existence of the legal malpractice action does not defeat plaintiff's claims. The court suggests that the parties stipulate to an order consolidating the two cases. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order which repeats verbatim the tentative ruling. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Continued To Nov-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS SEAN NICHOLSON AKA SEAN A. NICHOLSON and LESLIE NICHOLSON AKA LESLIE S. NICHOLSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to November 10, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 10, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
